zh.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion是Robert Marmion 3rd的兒子，於大約1182年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塔沃斯 卡素。他與Juliane de Vassi在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1242年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion是Robert Marmion 3rd的儿子，于大约1182年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾塔沃斯 卡素。他与Juliane de Vassi在英国英格兰斯塔福爾塔沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1242年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾塔沃斯享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion was born about 1182, in Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert Marmion 3rd. He married Juliane de Vassi in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1242, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion est né environ 1182, à Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert Marmion 3rd. Il a épousé Juliane de Vassi à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1242, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion wurde um 1182 in Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Robert Marmion 3rd geboren. Er hat in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Juliane de Vassi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1242 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion è nato il circa 1182 nel Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Robert Marmion 3rd. Lui sposato Juliane de Vassi nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1242, nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Marmionは約1182年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアタムウオルス カストルでRobert Marmion 3rdの息子として生まれた。イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスでJuliane de Vassiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1242年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion(은)는 대략 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 타워스 카스틀에서 Robert Marmion 3rd의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 Juliane de Vassi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Tamworth Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Robert Marmion 3rd. Ele casou-se com Juliane de Vassi em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Robert Marmion родился около 1182 г. в местности тамворт кастл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Robert Marmion 3rd. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliane de Vassi в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1242 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
